data.name: APEX - Site Inspection
data.description: For Manassas office during school inspections.  Contact Kim Mervine and Andrew Heller

entries.label: Sediment/Debris/Trash build up in drop inlets?
Signs of illicit discharge at drop inlets?
If fence installed, is it in good condition?
Sediment/Debris/Trash build up at trash rack?
If a dry basin, is there standing water?
Any pipe leaks, corrosion, or joint separations?
Is spillway pipe clean and free of debris?
If there is standing water or flow, what is the clarity?
Any pipe leaks, corrosion, or joint separations?
If there is water flow, what is the clarity?
